lifecycle.note: An incident timeline, evidence ledger, decisions, and closeout receipt.

blocks.title: A calm incident page for humans and agents
blocks.lede: Use this shape during an incident or post-incident review. It keeps the timeline, evidence, decisions, mitigations, and follow-up work in one structured artifact.

phases.body: Latency alert fired for `/api/search` p95 above threshold.
Traffic shifted away from the overloaded worker pool.
Queue depth returned to normal range.
Follow-up patch queued for backpressure and dashboard annotation.

items.title: Latency alert
items.body: p95 latency rose above the paging threshold for 7 minutes.

items.title: Worker logs
items.body: Retries increased after the upstream search provider slowed down.

items.title: Support sample
items.body: Three customers reported slow searches during the window.

decisions.rationale: Mitigates customer impact without changing application code during the incident.
The tuning path needs replay testing and is safer as a follow-up.

items.title: Add upstream backpressure
items.summary: Limit retry bursts when the search provider slows down.

items.title: Annotate incident dashboard
items.summary: Mark the mitigation window so later analysis is clear.

risks.mitigation: Ship backpressure and add a queue-depth alert.
Export affected-account list for support follow-up.

blocks.title: Closeout receipt
blocks.outcome: Customer impact mitigated, follow-up work queued
risks: Retry behavior still needs a tested code fix.
